name: Personal Attack
description: Targeting the person making an argument instead of the argument itself.

name: Bad Evidence
description: Conclusions built on weak, missing, or unrepresentative support.

name: Distorted Choices
description: Misrepresenting the available options or an opponent's position.

name: Emotional Manipulation
description: Using fear, pity, or flattery in place of reasons.

name: Causation Errors
description: Mistaking sequence or correlation for cause.

name: Framing & Bias
description: Steering judgement through selective framing or loaded presentation.

name: Bad Argument Form
description: Structural flaws where the argument's shape, not its content, is the problem.
